purpose: Validation schema for LocalAI application deployment profiles used after provider-backed cluster validation and before benchmark execution.
validationRules: The deployment profile must resolve a cycle profile and a baseline profile before application resources are applied.
The deployment profile must declare the Kustomize targets in the order required to create namespace, storage, shared services, server, and worker topology resources.
The deployment profile must declare the model, worker count, placement, namespace, expected active worker deployments, and smoke-test contract.
Application deployment must not proceed when the required cluster-validation gate does not allow application deployment.
Application deployment artifacts must be written under the cycle-specific results tree.
When a placement profile is declared, the deployment profile must include placementProfileId and placementProfilePath under deploymentTopology.placement.
Smoke validation should distinguish Kubernetes rollout from application-level HTTP readiness and should support retries, backoff, port-forward restarts, and failure diagnostics.
